become_provider.title: Become a Provider
become_provider.subtitle: Join BookitFly and start listing your travel packages to thousands of travelers across Saudi Arabia and the MENA region.
become_provider.benefit_1: Reach thousands of travelers actively searching for flights and travel packages.
become_provider.benefit_2: Manage your trips, bookings, and revenue all from a single dashboard.
become_provider.benefit_3: Receive fast, secure payouts directly to your bank account.
become_provider.step_1: Submit your application with your company details and required documents.
become_provider.step_2: Our team will review and verify your application within 2-3 business days.
become_provider.step_3: Once approved, set up your provider profile and start posting trips.
become_provider.step_4: Receive bookings and grow your business with BookitFly.
become_provider.application_received: Your application has been received! We will review it and get back to you shortly.
become_provider.terms_checkbox: I have read and agree to the BookitFly Provider Terms and Conditions.

homepage.hero_title: Find and Book the Best Travel Deals in Saudi Arabia
homepage.hero_subtitle: Exclusive travel deals at the best prices — all in one place
homepage.step1_desc: Browse available trips by destination, date, or price to find the perfect deal.
homepage.step2_desc: Select your seats, enter your details, and complete your booking in minutes.
homepage.step3_desc: Receive your confirmed booking and get ready for your trip.
homepage.for_providers_desc: Join BookitFly to list your travel packages, manage bookings, and reach more travelers across Saudi Arabia and the MENA region.
homepage.for_marketeers_desc: Join as a marketeer and earn FlyPoints for every booking made through your personal referral link.
homepage.flight_request_title: Didn't find your flight? Tell us what you need
homepage.flight_request_desc: Submit your flight details and our team will reach out with the best available options.
homepage.flight_request_notes_placeholder: Any extra details that help us find the best deal...
homepage.flight_request_success_desc: Our team will contact you within 24 hours with the best available options for your trip.
homepage.flight_request_cta_title: Can't find your flight? Request it now
homepage.flight_request_cta_desc: Submit your request and providers will compete to give you the best offer
homepage.flight_request_cta_point1: Submit your trip request with specific details
homepage.flight_request_cta_point2: Receive price offers from verified providers
homepage.flight_request_cta_point3: Choose the best offer and book directly

trips.title: Unbeatable Flight Deals
trips.description: Book flights from top providers across the kingdom. Best prices, instant confirmation, and flexible travel options.

rooms.title: Comfortable Stays & Resorts
rooms.description: Find the perfect room for your next trip. From luxury hotels to cozy apartments, we've got you covered.

cars.title: Flexible Car Rentals
cars.description: Rent the perfect car for your journey. Wide range of vehicles, competitive prices, and easy pickup options.

packages.title: Curated Travel Packages
packages.description: Complete travel experiences including flights, stays, and more. Save big with our bundled holiday deals.

last_minute.title: Last Minute Travel Deals
last_minute.description: Spontaneous traveler? Grab our exclusive last-minute offers and fly today for much less.

weekend_getaway.title: Weekend Getaways
weekend_getaway.description: Plan a quick break with zero hassle. Curated trips departing Thursday or Friday — back home refreshed by Sunday.

hajj_season.title: Hajj Flights
hajj_season.description: Dedicated Hajj-season flight packages from accredited providers. Limited seats — book early.

umrah_offer.title: Umrah Flights
umrah_offer.description: Umrah flights at the best prices from trusted providers. Flexible dates year-round.

family_friendly.title: Family Friendly Picks
family_friendly.description: Destinations and schedules that work for families. Adjacent seats, generous baggage, and kid-ready options.

become_marketeer.benefit_1: Earn FlyPoints for every booking made through your referral link
become_marketeer.benefit_2: Convert your points to Saudi Riyals on demand
become_marketeer.benefit_3: Track your performance and earnings in a dedicated dashboard
